diagram.title: Diagrams
diagram.openRepo: Open a repository to see diagrams
diagram.noDiagrams: No diagrams available for this repository
diagram.placeholder: Pick a diagram from the list
diagram.description.beanGraph: Spring/DI bean dependency graph — who injects whom.
diagram.description.packageTree: Java package hierarchy as a hierarchical tree.
diagram.description.folderMap: Filesystem heatmap. Picks up size and recency of every file.
diagram.description.c4Container: C4 container view — modules as containers, cross-module dependencies as edges.
diagram.description.architectureLayers: draw.io layer map — external contact at the edge, business logic in the middle, data persistence inside.
diagram.description.languageStats: File distribution by language — file count and bytes per bucket.
diagram.description.architectureFlow: Spring layers as horizontal bands with flow arrows — controller → service → repository → entity, with a bean histogram.
diagram.description.moduleChord: Modules as circle segments, cross-module dependencies as chords. Thickness = edge count.
diagram.description.activityHeatmap: GitHub-style calendar heatmap of the last 12 months. Hover shows commit count and top authors.

layout.both.hide: Hide modules and files columns (full view)
integrity.title: Build integrity
integrity.browser: Build integrity is only reported in the desktop app.
integrity.status.official.detail: Produced by the official CI release pipeline. Updater verifies signed bundles.
integrity.status.dev.detail: Self-compiled or otherwise outside the official pipeline. Auto-update is disabled to avoid clobbering your local changes.
integrity.status.forked.detail: The embedded updater public key does not match the official one. The auto-update channel is therefore not the official ProjectMind channel.
integrity.foot.docs: Compare the updater-key prefix with the value documented in the release notes / docs/security/updater-keys.md.
walkthrough.loading.title: Loading tour…
walkthrough.loading.hint: Fetching the steps from the MCP server.
walkthrough.none.title: No active tour
walkthrough.none.hint: Ask your AI to start a tour via
walkthrough.waiting.title: The AI is preparing an answer
walkthrough.waiting.metaBefore: As soon as the AI calls
walkthrough.waiting.metaAfter: again, this view automatically jumps to the follow-up tour.
walkthrough.cli.withQuestion: projectmind again: “{question}” — please answer as a focused follow-up tour (walkthrough_start with only the relevant steps)
walkthrough.cli.generic: projectmind check walkthrough_feedback and start a follow-up tour
walkthrough.finished.title: Tour completed
walkthrough.compass.aria: Tour compass — where this step sits in the codebase
artifact.notFound: This artifact is no longer available.
walkthrough.narration.label: AI explanation
walkthrough.feedback.label: What should the AI describe in more detail? (optional)
walkthrough.feedback.placeholder: e.g. “The highlighted lines 12–18 are still unclear to me.”
presenter.narrator.unavailable: No OS speech engine found (install say/espeak). Narrator is off.
presenter.overlay.risk: Toggle risk badges for this class (r)
presenter.overlay.pattern: Toggle pattern compliance for this class (p)
